rationale: Section 48.275 governs use of certain funds for employee health coverage contributions. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13, so increasing the exemption creates no direct conflict.
quote: a school district or participating charter school may use the sum of the following amounts of funds only to pay contributions under a group health coverage plan for district or school employees
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect school-finance revenue effects are outside this section's operative scope.
